en: What the hell was that do?
What's the story upstairs?, The power surrounding the cube is impenetrable.
ko: 위에서는 무슨 상황이야?, 큐브를 둘러싼 힘은 뚫을 수가 없어.

en: Thor's right., We got to deal with these guys., How do we do this?
ko: 토르 말이 맞아., 이놈들을 처리해야 해.

en: As a team, I have unfinished business with Loki.
ko: 어떻게 하지?, 팀으로., 로키랑은 끝내지 못한 일이 있어.

en: Yeah, we'll get in line., Save it.
ko: 그래, 줄 서서 기다려., 잔말 말고.

en: Loki's going to keep this fight focused on us, and that's what we need.
ko: 로키가 싸움을 우리한테 집중시킬 거야, 그게 우리한테 필요한 거야.

en: Without him, these things could run wild., We got
ko: 로키 없으면 이것들이 날뛸 거야., 위에

en: Stark up top. He's going to need us to.
